thinks.think: A white "FELT" logo with a red underline and "bicycles" text fades into visibility against a dark background. The scene brightens significantly, revealing the full text "2014 NINE & 7 SERIES" in white below the main logo, transitioning from a shadowed state to clear illumination.

The bright white "FELT bicycles" logo and the "2014 NINE & 7 SERIES" text begin to fade out. The overall illumination decreases rapidly, causing the white lettering and red underline to dim significantly until they are nearly obscured by the surrounding darkness.

The dark title card fades completely to black before cutting to a bright outdoor scene. Several thin trees with white bark and green leaves stand on a dry, grassy hillside. Sunlight filters through the canopy, revealing patches of blue sky above the forest.

A mountain biker wearing dark clothing and a helmet rides into view from the left, navigating through a grove of thin, white-barked trees. The cyclist pedals uphill across the dry, grassy slope, moving towards the right side of the frame while partially obscured by the foreground vegetation and tree trunks.

The cyclist in dark gear continues riding uphill to the right, passing behind thin tree trunks and green foliage. As the rider progresses further up the slope, the camera pans right, shifting focus from the athlete to the sun-drenched hillside vegetation and clear blue sky above the tree line.

The scene cuts to a close-up of a bicycle wheel rolling over dirt on the left, overlaid with heavy horizontal scanlines. In the background, a cyclist rides away along the sunlit trail. The camera angle is low, emphasizing the rough terrain and digital distortion effect.

The camera perspective shifts to follow a cyclist from behind as they ride away down a dirt trail. The rider wears dark shorts and a dark top, pedaling into a shadowed section of the path. Heavy horizontal scanlines continue to overlay the footage, distorting the view of the rough terrain and surrounding green foliage.

The scene cuts to a bright, clear view of a cyclist riding directly toward the camera along a narrow dirt path. Tall green grass and leafy bushes line both sides of the trail. The rider, wearing a dark shirt and helmet, navigates the sunlit path, free of the previous scanline distortion.

A mountain biker wearing a dark outfit and silver helmet rides directly toward the camera on a narrow dirt trail flanked by tall green grass. The rider approaches closely, revealing sunglasses, before exiting the frame, leaving the sunlit path empty amidst the surrounding leafy vegetation.

A blurry close-up shows a cyclist's midsection and handlebars against a brown, textured background. The rider wears black shorts with white stripes and grips handlebars featuring bright green accents. The camera tracks the rider's arm and leg movement, highlighting the bike frame and clothing details while the background remains out of focus.

The shot sharpens to reveal a cyclist's right hand gripping handlebars featuring bright yellow accents and brake levers. The rider wears black shorts with a white stripe on a black bike frame with matching yellow details. The background remains a blur of dry, brown vegetation as the camera follows the motion.

The camera maintains a tight close-up on the cyclist's midsection and handlebars, highlighting neon yellow accents on the black bars and frame. The rider wears black shorts with a white stripe. In the final moment, the shot loses focus completely, becoming a blur of dark clothing and a streak of bright yellow.

The scene cuts to a sunlit dirt track featuring a banked turn surrounded by dry, brown grass and prickly pear cacti. A cyclist wearing a white helmet and dark jersey leans heavily into the berm, navigating the curve from the right side.

A cyclist wearing a white helmet and black jersey exits a banked dirt turn. Leaning heavily into the curve surrounded by dry grass and cacti, the rider straightens the bike and pedals forward toward the camera, kicking up dust on the sunlit track.

The scene cuts to a shaded forest floor with large pine trees and scattered rocks. A cyclist wearing black shorts with white stripes rides into the frame from the right, passing a large tree trunk while navigating the dirt path covered in dry pine needles.

The cyclist in black shorts with white stripes rides away from the camera along a rocky path covered in pine needles. They pass a large tree trunk on the right, moving deeper into the shaded forest as the bike traverses the uneven, sun-dappled terrain.

A cyclist wearing a black jersey with white lettering and black shorts with white stripes rides directly towards the camera on a narrow dirt trail. The rider wears black gloves and pedals a black mountain bike through dry, grassy terrain with green bushes in the background.

A cyclist wearing black shorts with white stripes and black socks rides a black mountain bike directly toward the camera on a narrow dirt trail. The front wheel rotates over the dusty path as the rider pedals through dry grass and bushes, moving closer until the front tire dominates the lower frame.

The scene cuts to a side profile of a stationary black mountain bike with white "FELT" lettering on the frame leaning against the base of a large tree trunk. The bike features black wheels with white tire text and disc brakes, positioned on a ground covered in brown pine needles within a forest setting.

A black mountain bike with bright yellow accents on the frame leans stationary against a large grey boulder. The bicycle features a front suspension fork and knobby tires, resting on ground covered in brown pine needles. Green trees and dry brush are visible in the sunlit background behind the bike.

The scene transitions to a cyclist riding away from the camera on a narrow dirt trail. The rider wears black shorts with white stripes and black socks, pedaling a black mountain bike. Dry, reddish-brown grass and green bushes line the path. The camera follows closely behind, focusing on the rear wheel and the rider's legs as they navigate the sunlit, dusty track.

A cyclist wearing a black jersey with a white logo on the back and a black helmet rides away from the camera down a narrow dirt trail. The rider navigates through dry, reddish-brown grass and green bushes, moving further into the distance as the camera follows from behind along the sunlit path.

The cyclist, wearing a black jersey with a white logo and helmet, rides away from the camera and steers sharply right off the dirt trail. They navigate directly into tall, dry grass and bushes, becoming increasingly obscured by the dense vegetation as they move further from the main path.

The scene cuts to a wide shot of a rocky hillside under a clear blue sky. Large grey boulders cover the left slope while green trees line the right. In the distance, a cyclist rides down a narrow dirt path, navigating the rugged terrain between the rocks and vegetation.

A cyclist wearing a black jersey and white helmet approaches down a narrow dirt trail. The rider navigates the rocky path situated between a steep slope of large grey boulders on the left and dense green trees on the right, descending toward the camera.

A cyclist in a black jersey with red sleeves and white helmet navigates a rocky trail toward the camera. The scene transitions to a static close-up of a bike tire labeled "RACING RALPH" resting on dry pine needles against a tree trunk.

The shot focuses on the front wheel and suspension fork of a bike resting on pine needles. White "ROCKSHOX" text is printed vertically on the black fork leg, and "DEORE XT" branding appears on the rim. The disc brake rotor is visible near the hub against a background of rough tree bark.

The camera tilts upward along the front wheel and fork of a stationary bike. Vertical white "ROCKSHOX" lettering appears on the black suspension leg. As the view rises, "SCHWALBE" branding becomes clearly visible on the upper tire sidewall, while "DEORE XT" text persists on the rim against a background of rough tree bark.

The camera tilts upward along the stationary bike's front wheel, revealing the white "SCHWALBE" logo on the upper tire sidewall. The vertical "ROCKSHOX" text on the black suspension fork and "DEORE XT" branding on the rim remain visible against the rough tree bark background.

The scene cuts to a wide shot of a sun-drenched hillside covered in dry, golden-brown grasses and clusters of yellow flowers. Dark green trees and shrubs fill the background on the slope. The warm lighting suggests late afternoon, illuminating the textured vegetation across the terrain.

A sunlit hillside with dry grass and yellow flowers is visible. A cyclist in dark clothing and a helmet rides into view from the right, moving through the brush. Bright sunlight creates a lens flare as the rider navigates the terrain among the trees.

A cyclist dressed in dark clothing rides a mountain bike through a wooded area, moving towards the left. Bright sunlight filters through the trees, creating a significant lens flare that partially obscures the rider and casts them in silhouette against the golden, dry vegetation and green bushes.

A cyclist in dark gear rides left through sunlit woods, silhouetted against bright backlighting. Passing behind foreground vegetation, they are partially obscured by lens flare and shadows while navigating dry golden terrain and green bushes before disappearing into the shaded forest area.

The cyclist rides further left into the deep shadows of the forest, becoming nearly invisible. The scene then transitions to a static close-up shot of a matte black bicycle frame with white "FELT" lettering, resting against a textured tree trunk.

The scene cuts to a static close-up of a matte black bicycle frame leaning against a tree trunk with rough, reddish-brown bark. Large white "FELT" lettering runs diagonally across the downtube. The rear wheel and chain mechanism are visible on the left, while the front fork and wheel appear on the right side.

A matte black bicycle frame featuring large white "FELT" lettering rests against a tree trunk with rough, reddish-brown bark. The camera slowly pulls back to reveal the black front suspension fork labeled "ROCKSHOX," along with the handlebars and knobby tires flanking the frame.

The scene cuts to a close-up of a black bicycle crankset. White "DEORE XT" lettering is visible on the crank arm near the bottom bracket, with "SHIMANO" printed towards the pedal end. Silver chainring teeth surround the black spider assembly against a blurred background.

The view shifts to the front frame section against rough tree bark. White "FELT" lettering runs along the matte black down tube. A black suspension fork features a "ROCK SHOX" sticker, positioned next to a tire rim labeled "DEORE XT".

The view remains fixed on the front section of the matte black bicycle frame positioned against rough tree bark. Prominent white "FELT" lettering adorns the down tube, while the black front fork displays a "ROCK SHOX" sticker and the adjacent wheel rim features "DEORE XT" branding, with handlebars visible at the top.

The scene cuts to a wider shot displaying the entire matte black bicycle leaning against a large tree trunk with rough, reddish-brown bark. Sunlight filters through the green forest background, illuminating the bike's frame, handlebars, and knobby tires as it rests on the dirt path.

The camera slowly pulls back, revealing yellow foliage on the right edge and more of the forest floor around the matte black bicycle. The full profile displays red accents on the rear triangle and white "WTB" lettering on the tires against the large tree trunk.

A macro shot displays the red seat tube of a bicycle frame. White lettering with a black honeycomb pattern runs vertically along the red paint. A blurred black tire with knobs is visible on the right side. The background remains a soft focus of brown earth and rocks.

The camera tilts up along the frame, showing a black carbon fiber weave with a red stripe. Small white "NINER" text is visible on the red section. Below, large white lettering with a black honeycomb infill runs along the tube, adjacent to a blurred knobby tire.

The view shifts to a close-up of the bicycle's black handlebars, featuring red accents on the grips and black brake levers. Thin cables extend from the controls, set against a blurred background of green forest foliage and brown earth.

The camera focuses on the black stem featuring red lettering, positioned centrally on the head tube. To the left, a black brake lever and gear shifter are mounted on the handlebar. Red locking rings secure the black grips at the ends of the bars. Black cables route neatly from the components, contrasting with the soft-focus green and brown woodland background.

The camera pans left along the black handlebars, centering on the left grip with red locking rings and the attached brake lever. Black cables route from the controls, while the stem with red graphics shifts to the right edge. The background consists of out-of-focus green forest foliage and brown earth.

A cyclist wearing a white helmet and dark jersey rides down a dry, brush-covered hillside. The terrain features brown earth and scattered green cacti. In the distance, rolling hills with houses are visible under a clear sky. The rider descends from the upper left towards the center.

A cyclist wearing a white helmet and black clothing rides a mountain bike down a dry, dusty trail. The rider descends from the left, navigating through brown brush and green cacti. The bike's wheels roll over the uneven terrain as the cyclist moves toward the right side of the frame.

A cyclist wearing a white helmet and black jersey with white sleeves rides toward the camera. The view shifts to a closer angle focusing on the rider's torso and legs in black shorts pedaling a black bike with yellow accents, navigating through dry, brown brush and scattered green cacti.

A cyclist wearing black shorts and socks pedals a mountain bike with yellow handlebar accents directly toward the camera. The shot focuses on the rider's legs and front wheel traversing a dry, dusty trail surrounded by brown brush and green cacti, with foreground branches slightly obscuring the view.

A tight shot follows the front wheel and suspension fork of a bicycle moving over dry earth. The rider's legs, wearing black shorts and socks, pump the pedals. Brown brush lines the trail edges. The camera angle is low, emphasizing the tire tread and fork movement against the dusty ground.

The shot continues tracking the cyclist's lower body and the bike's front end. The rider pedals a black mountain bike with neon yellow accents on the frame. They wear black shorts and socks while navigating a dirt path surrounded by dry, brown brush. The front tire rolls steadily over the dusty surface.

The camera captures a front-facing close-up of the cyclist's legs and the bike's front wheel. The rider pedals a black mountain bike with neon yellow accents along a dirt trail. Black shorts and socks are visible as the front tire rolls over the dry, dusty ground amidst brown brush.

The view shifts lower, focusing on the front tire and suspension fork rolling over the dirt. The rider's legs in black shorts and socks continue pedaling. Neon yellow accents on the black frame are prominent. The background consists of dry, brown brush and dusty earth as the bicycle advances along the trail.

The scene transitions to a static close-up of the bicycle's rear frame section. A black seat post features a bright neon yellow decal. The camera focuses on the glossy black frame junction where the seat stays connect, revealing cable routing guides against a blurred natural background.

The camera pans down a black seat post featuring a bright yellow decal, revealing the seat clamp and glossy black frame junction. Cable routing guides are visible along the top tube near the seat stays, while a blurred rear tire appears in the background against soft-focus greenery.

The camera presents a static close-up of the bicycle's rear drivetrain resting on a grey rock. Silver gears, a chain, and a derailleur are visible. The black chainstay displays a neon yellow stripe, connecting to a crankset arm labeled "XCR" near the rear tire.

The scene shifts to a static close-up of the bicycle's upper frame, showcasing a matte black top tube with internal cable routing. Handlebars feature neon yellow accents on the grips and stem, positioned above a suspension fork against a blurred background of trees and foliage.

The camera maintains a steady close-up on the front section of the matte black bicycle frame. Visible elements include the black handlebars with neon yellow grip accents, the stem, brake cables routed along the top tube, the head tube, and the front suspension fork and tire with partial white lettering against a blurred woodland background.

The static shot of the matte black bicycle's front assembly persists, showing neon yellow grip accents and brake cables against blurred trees. The scene then transitions abruptly as the entire frame dissolves into a bright, opaque pinkish-white light, erasing the visual details of the bike and background.

Following the bright pinkish-white transition, the scene cuts to a cyclist riding on a sandy trail. The rider wears a white helmet with red accents and a dark sleeveless top, navigating through dry, brown brush and sparse green vegetation on a sunlit hillside.

A cyclist in a dark sleeveless jersey and shorts with a white and red helmet rides away down a sandy path. The rider navigates through dry, brown scrub brush and green plants on a sunny hillside, moving further into the distance away from the camera viewpoint.

The cyclist, clad in a dark sleeveless top and white helmet with red accents, continues riding away from the camera down a sandy trail. Surrounded by dry brown brush and sparse green vegetation, the rider navigates the winding path, moving deeper into the sunlit background as they progress along the dirt course.

A cyclist wearing a dark sleeveless top and white helmet with red accents continues riding away from the camera along a sandy trail. Surrounded by dry brown brush and sparse green vegetation, the rider navigates the winding path, moving deeper into the sunlit background as they progress further up the dirt course.

The cyclist, wearing a dark sleeveless top and white helmet with red accents, continues riding away from the camera up a sandy trail. Surrounded by dry brown brush and sparse green vegetation, the rider moves further into the distance, navigating the winding path under bright sunlight as they ascend the hill.

The cyclist, wearing dark clothing and a white helmet with red accents, continues riding away from the camera up a winding sandy trail. Surrounded by dry brown brush and sparse green vegetation under bright sunlight, the rider ascends the hillside, moving further into the distance along the dirt path.

A cyclist wearing dark clothing and a white helmet with red accents rides away from the camera up a winding sandy trail. Surrounded by dry brown brush and sparse green vegetation under bright sunlight, the rider ascends the hillside, navigating the dirt path further into the distance.

The cyclist continues ascending the sandy trail, moving further away from the camera towards the hill's crest. Surrounded by dry, brown brush and sparse green vegetation under bright sunlight, the rider navigates the winding dirt path, becoming smaller in the frame as they progress uphill.

The cyclist continues riding away from the camera, ascending the sandy trail towards the hill's crest. Surrounded by dry brown brush and sparse green vegetation under bright sunlight, the rider moves further into the distance, navigating the winding dirt path as they approach the top.

A cyclist wearing a black sleeveless top, black shorts, and a white helmet with red accents continues riding away from the camera. They ascend a sandy trail surrounded by dry brown brush and sparse green vegetation, moving further into the distance towards the hill's crest under bright sunlight.

The cyclist, wearing a black sleeveless top, shorts, and a white helmet with red accents, continues riding away from the camera. They ascend the sandy trail, moving further into the distance towards the hill's crest amidst dry brown brush under bright sunlight.

The scene transitions to a black background featuring a white "FELT" logo with a red underline and "bicycles" text. Below, the text "2014 NINE & 7 SERIES" fades in and brightens, becoming fully legible in the center of the screen.

The white "FELT" logo with a red underline and "bicycles" text remains centered on a black background, accompanied by "2014 NINE & 7 SERIES" underneath. The graphic gradually dims, fading into darkness as the video concludes.

The white "FELT" logo featuring a red underline and "bicycles" text, positioned above the "2014 NINE & 7 SERIES" caption, grows increasingly dim against the dark background. The graphic elements lose visibility rapidly until the screen transitions into complete darkness, leaving only a black frame.

summary.text:
[0-4] A white "FELT" logo with a red underline and "bicycles" text fades in against a dark background, brightening to reveal "2014 NINE & 7 SERIES" below before fading out and dimming rapidly.
[4-10] The scene cuts to thin trees with white bark and green leaves on a dry, grassy hillside under a blue sky. A mountain biker in dark clothing and a helmet rides left to right through the grove, navigating uphill until the camera pans to the sun-drenched vegetation.
[10-14] A close-up shows a bicycle wheel rolling over dirt on the left, overlaid with heavy horizontal scanlines. The camera follows a cyclist in dark shorts and a top from behind as they ride away down a shadowed trail, with the digital distortion effect persisting over the rough terrain and foliage.

[14-18] A mountain biker wearing a dark outfit and silver helmet rides directly toward the camera on a narrow dirt trail flanked by tall green grass and leafy bushes. [18-24] The camera cuts to a close-up tracking the rider's midsection and handlebars, revealing a black bike frame with neon yellow accents and black shorts with a white stripe against a blurred brown background before losing focus. [24-28] The scene shifts to a sunlit dirt track with a banked turn surrounded by dry grass and cacti, where the cyclist, wearing a white helmet and black jersey, leans into the berm and exits the curve, kicking up dust.

[28-32] A cyclist in black shorts with white stripes navigates a rocky, pine-needle-covered path, passing a large tree trunk in a shaded forest. [32-36] The rider, wearing a black jersey with white lettering and gloves, pedals a black mountain bike toward the camera on a narrow dirt trail. [36-40] Static shots display a black mountain bike with white "FELT" text leaning against a tree, followed by a black bike with yellow accents resting against a boulder. [40-42] The cyclist rides away from the camera on a dusty trail, the rear wheel kicking up dust amidst dry reddish-brown grass and green bushes.

[42-46] A cyclist in a black jersey with a white logo and black helmet rides away down a dirt trail, then steers sharply right into tall grass and bushes. [46-52] The scene shifts to a rocky hillside where a cyclist in a black jersey with red sleeves and white helmet descends a narrow path between boulders and trees toward the camera. [52-56] The view cuts to a stationary bike wheel on pine needles. Close-ups show "RACING RALPH" on the tire, "ROCKSHOX" on the black fork, "DEORE XT" on the rim, and "SCHWALBE" on the tire sidewall.

[56-58] Camera tilts upward along the stationary bike's front wheel against tree bark, showing white "SCHWALBE" on the upper tire sidewall, vertical "ROCKSHOX" on the black fork, and "DEORE XT" on the rim. [58-60] Cut to a wide shot of a sun-drenched hillside with dry golden grasses, clusters of bright yellow flowers, and dark green trees. [60-66] A cyclist in dark gear and helmet rides right-to-left through sunlit woods, silhouetted by bright lens flare as they navigate dry golden vegetation and green bushes. [66-68] The rider disappears into deep shadows. Cut to a matte black bike frame with white "FELT" lettering leaning against a textured tree trunk. [68-70] Static close-up shows the matte "FELT" frame, rear wheel, chain mechanism, and front fork against rough, reddish-brown tree bark.

[70-78] Close-ups feature a matte black frame with white "FELT" lettering against tree bark, paired with a black "ROCKSHOX" fork and "DEORE XT" rim. A black crankset displays "DEORE XT" and "SHIMANO" logos.
[78-82] A wide shot reveals a full bicycle profile leaning against a large tree in a forest, showing red rear triangle accents and tires with white "WTB" lettering.
[82-86] Macro views highlight a red frame section with white lettering and a black honeycomb pattern, tilting up to show carbon weave, a red stripe, and small "NINER" text.

[86-92] Close-up shots display a bicycle's black handlebars featuring red accents on the grips and stem, along with black brake levers and shifters against a blurred woodland background. [92-100] The scene transitions to a cyclist wearing a white helmet and dark jersey riding down a dry, brush-covered hillside dotted with green cacti. The rider navigates the dusty terrain, moving from the upper left towards the camera, on a black bike with yellow handlebar accents.

[100-108] A cyclist wearing black shorts and socks rides a black mountain bike with neon yellow accents along a dirt path. Low-angle shots follow the front suspension fork and tire traversing dry, dusty earth lined with brown brush.
[108-112] The camera focuses on the bike's frame, showing a black seat post with a neon yellow decal. It pans down to the glossy black frame junction, revealing cable guides and the text "FELT" and "7SIXTY" on the tubing.
[112-114] A static close-up displays the rear drivetrain resting on a grey rock. Silver gears, a chain, and a derailleur are visible near a black chainstay with a neon yellow stripe. The crankset arm features the label "XCR".

[114-120] A static close-up reveals a matte black bicycle frame with internal cable routing and handlebars accented with neon yellow. The shot includes the stem, suspension fork, and tire with white lettering against blurred trees before dissolving into opaque pinkish-white light. [120-128] The scene cuts to a cyclist wearing a dark sleeveless top, shorts, and a white helmet with red accents riding away on a sandy trail. Surrounded by dry brown brush and sparse green vegetation on a sunlit hillside, the rider navigates the winding path, progressing further into the distance.

[128-140] A cyclist wearing a black sleeveless top, black shorts, and a white helmet with red accents rides away from the camera. They ascend a winding sandy trail surrounded by dry brown brush and sparse green vegetation under bright sunlight. The rider navigates the dirt path further into the distance, moving towards the hill's crest. As they progress uphill, the cyclist becomes smaller in the frame. The bright sunlight illuminates the dry landscape as the rider continues along the path, ascending the hillside.
